content: Hello! I'll give implementing Conversion from byte slices for types implementing FromBytes [TRSM] a try. Any tips or pointers not already present on the task will be welcome!
I just found out it was already implemented https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/DCEJ9SV4LBJL.11EUZVXX6EB9H@nvidia.com/ :laughing:
